title: submit_score_code submits unchanged YAML when str_replace_editor fails
description: submit_score_code in ScoreEditorToolset had a disk fallback path that read stale content from /tmp/plexus_score_edit_exchange.yaml. When str_replace_editor failed and content was unchanged, it submitted the stale exchange file as a new version. Fix: removed disk fallback, added unchanged content guard. Also updated agent prompt to call done(cannot_improve) on edit failures.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Fix applied in score_editor_toolset.py and feedback_alignment_optimizer.yaml. Two changes: (1) submit_score_code now rejects if content unchanged from original, (2) agent prompt tells LLM to call done(cannot_improve) after edit failures.
